title: Mal’tsev bases for partially commutative nilpotent groups
journal: International Journal of Algebra and Computation
publisher: World Scientific Pub Co Pte Ltd
abstract: We construct an ordered set of commutators in a partially commutative nilpotent group [Formula: see text]. This set allows us to define a canonical form for each element of [Formula: see text]. Namely, we construct a Mal’tsev basis for the group [Formula: see text]
